textByHash.7e8192809e8d10a092aea51b013d4cfb2118fb43: What is this place? This is Soul Wars, a glorious battleground where you must fight to crush the souls of your enemies!
textByHash.2892db389c06cb99ab980cd06e44dcfa51593c6b: I can give you a demonstration if you're interested?
textByHash.b8b1f7b9e33f53812416ebf120df854088a068f6: Hmm, you're not looking so great. You should cure yourself of poison before I give you the demonstration.
textByHash.9052c2c05b7e0829240ac602ad7aae3ca7dd10c2: Hmm, you don't look so good. You should cure yourself of disease before I give you the demonstration.
textByHash.e1ec42118cedd0d80bd9a90503231d8b5c6a84ba: Hmm, it looks like you have some restricted items with you. You should put them somewhere safe before we continue. Food, potions, capes, followers and non-combat items are all restricted.
textByHash.7abc2b9ccac55a403f565a5e2360c415be20bdfe: Hmm, it looks like you're not actually ready for a demonstration right now.
textByHash.3e8ae292acaa1bcd5c7c8f4cb43e6b08011e25a0: So be it. You know where to find me if you change your mind.
textByHash.fb6d598dee3e46dd75bf6a172fd45df01b5dde4b: Ah, you again. Are you ready for that demonstration?
textByHash.6cf0bf84f9859b761b5204ab42bf5f67b293aacb: Ah, you again. If you're here to crush some souls then I'm afraid you won't be able to. I can still help with anything else you need though.
textByHash.cfc13a4a45caa2bddf6d81d87094ee6bf9dc30f8: Ah, you again. Are you here to crush some souls? Just head into a waiting area if you want to get started.
textByHash.3c282a5f93bb631771b26b411616689697a42b49: Well I've given you the demonstration. Best thing now is to head into a waiting area and get started. That said, you won't be able to do that at the moment.
textByHash.6dba8c484b2f77def000a8f8ba9058b1055e8b37: I can give you the demonstration again if you want? I also have a book that might be useful.
textByHash.0e11939f7865dbc27cad2eb092c213cb673ab81d: Well I've given you the demonstration. Best thing now is to head into a waiting area and get started. That said, I can give you the demonstration again if you want? I also have a book that might be useful.
textByHash.c4eaa9eca9301f59bb7856d63ba71215b38ed4a4: Hmm, you're not looking so great. You should cure yourself of disease before I give you the demonstration.
textByHash.7cde621229b75f67138c40cac2f82283c6ee9b9f: It looks like you already have one.
textByHash.268830a28bd818726470d20328c0853d9ed76961: Is there something else you need?
textByHash.9f8a5f5232e3fca5a2d78f21d1a4c5f2e2ef3c79: Now, is there something else you need?
textByHash.88dbbfba67c5f038f13d3ee2a8d226c65629f968: Certainly! I sell various rewards to those who have earned Zeal from Soul Wars battles.
textByHash.6eb4229d55e317aaff9d1d67edea256743c3ee4b: I can offer you some of my knowledge in various skills, I can use my abilities to imbue some of your items with additional power, and I also have some items I have found on my travels.
textByHash.1599b73097938b5bdfdc72b9470e1ea7cb1e2f8f: Very well. Is there something else you need?
textByHash.40a20b9508bddea434937e5a6e6b4d35c3dd6dab: How are the new capes working out for you?
textByHash.785f298919039b602b4153246687fa1351a65c82: Great, now get back in there and crush some souls!
textByHash.a327899d03a9c77a8f6607e55b223c35c4942bef: Well if you show me a better device I might be able to sort something out for you.
textByHash.8aa45d915a00ac719edc26661a260ea263837354: You've already shown me this dead chicken. I don't really need to see it again. I might be able to do something if you show me a better one, though.
textByHash.10f34f424c8cb9c6eb0f17f2e8749843757204d9: Hmm, very interesting. Let's see what we can do.
textByHash.e593e6114662d1567e0d00f28c82f0f8acdc715b: There we go! It's not quite the same, but it should work out just fine for you.
textByHash.fc02be99ed7a974e4f884ede3243c27f5c87a8d5: Bear in mind that the enchantment is bound to my power and so will only work for you while you are in a Soul Wars battle.
textByHash.4466650729396472a504bc3ae89f859cb920015e: I don't really have time to discuss the finer points of Fletching, you know.
textByHash.2b6549dabb786b8b133f479fcf0f2415133c28ba: Really? If you could show it to me, I might be able to sort something out for you.
textByHash.aa0baf45ee4c96d4323f34049da79090606a2a5f: Welcome to Soul Wars! Let's get started.
textByHash.eb02b8b3c76b4f15d4010d0b0365681174ed1034: To the south you will have seen an avatar. You must fight to protect your team's avatar, and defeat the opposing team's avatar.
textByHash.7b5156a6479178e4e6a16db7c2bb49eb56a33314: You're here to fight, not whine.
textByHash.744cde60a9c197d2f71ba46506139017784c34be: By capturing the Soul Obelisk, which lies at the centre of the battleground, and offering it soul fragments.
textByHash.bf7c999a89b3fbc6122f1c7e20395fa3ab7d6351: Let's head towards the Obelisk now. I can point out some of the important landmarks on the way. Meet me to the north when you are ready to learn more.
textByHash.161a5d8f94ade79cef2970c3d1bbe0b17ce2d911: Hey! You don't need those. You're not in a real battle yet.
textByHash.442f2419e0e87152ae197fbbd24e6f068c32102f: Hey! Don't attack those. You're not in a real battle yet.
textByHash.5168b1109c2938bfb84551cb465a429b50fb88b6: To continue the demonstration, come speak to me. I'm by the avatar in the south-west of the battleground.
textByHash.27ce2298da78faf3d055beff3404dadee22967c8: This is one of the graveyards that your team can capture.
textByHash.d585ab0c1baf240afc8d1c48673dfe5c5493ee76: For the purposes of this demonstration, however, I have kept it inactive.
textByHash.e656163ebe51fae94e21c6778b26f16b48943ef0: You might find this little area behind me useful for defending your avatar. There's one in the other team's base, too.
textByHash.41ca60e3fe74fd9dc39686e5f5cc73e42a1f135b: During battle, you can gather supplies here to aid you and your teammates.
textByHash.409c86cf0fca545d1cabb18b299aad2f002bdf8a: The Soul Obelisk is just a little way from here. Let's continue on; I'll meet you to the east.
textByHash.c8061532a5807cfd478ff7a32d8a60f6c0d69137: Now, to have a chance against an avatar, you are going to need souls. Lots of souls.
textByHash.7a8c8972ef2d85fdd9742e6e45062d8212156b79: The Soul Obelisk is immensely powerful and, by channelling souls into it, you can weaken the enemy avatar.
textByHash.6b8a86502dd6c88fed7bc6b87edd5b97bed0361f: All I know is that it does, and that you should do it. Lots.
textByHash.64f79f17aab63058e4b8bb122d1693e8bbc705af: You can kill the souls that inhabit the arena ruins and harvest their soul fragments.
textByHash.1051ab47eef1457da91467136bf941e7160f94e8: For the purposes of this demonstration however, we will use my minion Zimberfizz.
textByHash.d17b47348228b4029127daf05e0a8f934460b9db: When you kill a creature in Soul Wars, they will leave a soul fragment behind, which you can use to charge the Soul Obelisk.
textByHash.40e42fdc8d638a448fecb41f908c76cbab6f7541: Zimberfizz has such a soul fragment. Why don't you kill him and take it?
textByHash.506042381e48d019954fb1fe68169569684fc58f: Come on! Kill him already and get that soul fragment.
textByHash.1e09846425812f0dcaba9a626e5c3f933876b52f: Good job! Let's carry on to the Soul Obelisk and channel this soul fragment into it. It's just to the east, over a bridge and on a small island.
textByHash.e1916527839bbec3e4ec9fa9d62f157785dd8b04: Good job! Now, you've got that soul fragment, right?
textByHash.8253f740721e05b7d6344d75102c598004402be5: You've lost it? You're lucky you're not in a real battle yet!
textByHash.b401de4ae9967d938be099634a88c981f2a45ff1: Here, have this one. Just look after it this time.
textByHash.ca77f13ad044f0534934a5891947eae45827fca6: Make some space and I'll give you one. Just look after it this time.
textByHash.631767c3d1776d8717f8580140082aef85a29c88: Now! Let's carry on to the Soul Obelisk and channel this soul fragment into it. It's just to the east, over a bridge and on a small island.
textByHash.ecaeba62b289eb3085957a8eec4ed4e28e885c9c: Here we are at the Soul Obelisk. Now, you've got that soul fragment, right?
textByHash.e0fb3875060a4488ac271c64a7ed51339edb9962: Here we are at the Soul Obelisk. Now, to reap the full benefit of the soul fragment, you will need to first be in control of the Obelisk.
textByHash.d45b2eb6009320a0683d47cc2bf51bd4adb8ef74: Various areas of the battleground can come under your team's control. To gain control, you must have more team members than the opposing team in these areas.
textByHash.6777ba289523b3ffa812f55b43f920ae865c74d5: If you outnumber the enemy, you will gradually take control. Let's try it out now.
textByHash.d5c4e89bb05c77ba51982658115428c286057114: We shall use Zimberfizz to represent an enemy team member.
textByHash.78b26e66b9d38f685e86a030bb9346d897bce432: Come on, give him a good kick.
textByHash.6ea0bcdc5cc3249fc7729782005cd1a50ebeb2c0: Ha! He wishes! No, his service to me is far from over.
textByHash.283ea675c0390fa20b02b263dcd4a505a86a5e88: Ha! I'm sure he loves the attention, right Zimberfizz?
textByHash.7d179800cb7b858a2ea3f77a5e876c46e429877b: Right, now that Zimberfizz is no longer in the Obelisk's capturable area, you outnumber the enemy! The Soul Obelisk will now begin to fall under your control.
textByHash.6222b348f82487138179334b692f1de0e427cba2: Right. Now, go and charge the Obelisk with that soul fragment and see what happens.
textByHash.09d51d9004a31d9bbb51608482ad458c3a98184f: Go on, use the soul fragment on the Obelisk.
textByHash.6655093b013b9daa7d0e8b6925fa2dbf0faf0298: Good job! Now that you have charged the Obelisk, the enemy avatar will have been weakened.
textByHash.21e74a8c50e33cc66718ed55b1152dea41747e7f: Ha! I think not! I'm not about to reward those who don't put the effort in!
textByHash.418209f2580a0f9f728de9753db00c5136680705: Hmm, why don't we go find out?
textByHash.fa66672d0ee8c8a2c4e7b8af5de54c5060793144: So, here we are in the enemy base.
textByHash.74bcea61730de113c84d454632eade2ebb202d05: Yeah, and it looks like you made it pretty mad.
textByHash.8649d32a23e24ce55eb41c695472609366f72e10: Ha! Don't worry - I won't let it kill you.
textByHash.7ef6e28c3f04b0e0f7c895b90973b7de7558c5ff: Of course, that doesn't mean I won't kill you.
textByHash.fa241ae50e07e56bc054990b6c1337f7871b263f: At least it wasn't permanent! Think of it as an opportunity to learn.
textByHash.02e078a13a084911afab1a6682941e8505b9e48c: The other team will be after you and any soul fragments you have collected, after all.
textByHash.da446b627fed92bef5cb4c702f8ca082baae89d8: I needed to show you what happens when you fall in battle.
textByHash.e537ab086f348bfb2750e4affdd7404c91bc900b: Not exactly. The Soul Obelisk tried to claim your soul, as it does with all who perish in the battleground.
textByHash.49c2cc6ed4286478a5f9ec2e0daca26207987ce5: Only my power brought you here, and returned you to life.
textByHash.5cb3e30d9fc7f5b97a4b0512f26fbcb7d339f531: You're more useful to me alive... for now.
textByHash.d16c1c7c82b22929dc091812cf6d29a9994166a3: There is much more to this place, but you don't need to know about it yet.
textByHash.eb01aa9b9927964c1992a0ea9990c5041779648c: If you want to learn more, I can give you a Soul Wars guide upon our return to the waiting area.
textByHash.2324caebf4de820f179b48cd9ad06e22e3808bd1: Use the large blue portal at the back of this graveyard to return to the waiting area. Why not sign up for a battle while you're there?
textByHash.17587c2b7b67e20de05790ed2637c1d102b0dde6: Use the portal over there to return to the waiting area. I'll see you on the other side!
textByHash.da1dcc11551fd2cf460d46fea28da965e98cb9d2: Here we are. The waiting areas are just south of here, but you won't be able to join a battle right now.
textByHash.4e9dff1e17f5ee5fd5741427e148f3d4d267c4d0: Here we are. Just head south to the waiting areas if you want to join a battle.
textByHash.7ccea3f204a30217f3ca463c323feea584811c9a: I can offer you experience in various skills, and items I have found on my travels.
textByHash.43f6d0bb1b077d7928f4989f6426a978ebe7f534: I have a copy of the Soul Wars guide here. It contains information that I didn't have time to cover.
textByHash.e4312b0a6b47c3a4a9d4c8dfac910c4e4a49b993: You don't need to know it all to get started, but the section on burying bones could be useful.
textByHash.3c0cadedabbe2726b3ddc9179294fec4a78df2e4: Did you want to take it and read it in your own time?
textByHash.7371dca229eb7a91bfdc2e669e21914a3bde7c3c: Hmm, it looks like you already have one.
textByHash.0a291cd1063484de78096d97c108364ef3520883: You've already shown me this dead chicken. I don't really need to see it again.
textByHash.b93e3f95a2fd50666e1125f2c7026586d6694b49: Let's see what we can do.
textByHash.6979fa48a626e572be7184447a7dcf1998a3021a: There we go. It's not quite the same, but it should work out just fine for you.
textByHash.ffbd174baf2006c08798513b1e52f7b36e097744: Hmm, very interesting. This one seems more powerful than the last one you showed me.
textByHash.753961bdf151eb3767866b0db463080be8d640a7: The time is now! Crush their souls!
textByHash.c4495f997fa5391d281e0f8d83344c5ca762e2d9: Well I'm still getting things set up right now. Once everything is ready, return to me and I'll give you a demonstration.
textByHash.ff2a2a443a9ed0cd18b45d147bbe95c7b0056fb6: Here to crush some souls? Just head into a waiting area to the south to get started.
textByHash.59c1638dcb03f302193f26b31eca241b9e91e8e2: Hey! Talk to me if you want to know anything worth knowing.
